creator: vm@vitalius.net
text:
In 2007, Greenery Day will move to May 4, and April 29 will be changed to Showa Day in accordance with a 2005 revision of the law pertaining to public holidays.

Source:
	http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greenery_Day
	http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Holidays_of_Japan#Planned_changes

How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
